title: MSHA Mine Safety Standards
description: Comply with MSHA safety standards per 30 CFR 56-77.

title: MSHA Underground Coal Mining
description: Apply MSHA Part 75 for underground coal mining safety.

title: MSHA Underground Metal/Nonmetal
description: Apply MSHA Part 57 for underground metal/nonmetal mining.

title: MSHA Surface Metal/Nonmetal
description: Apply MSHA Part 56 for surface metal/nonmetal mining.

title: MSHA Surface Coal Mining
description: Apply MSHA Part 77 for surface coal mining safety.

title: MSHA Part 46 Training
description: Provide MSHA Part 46/48 training for miners.

title: Respirable Dust Standard
description: Apply MSHA respirable coal mine dust standard 1.5 mg/m³.

title: Silica Exposure Standard
description: Apply MSHA respirable crystalline silica standard 50 µg/m³.

title: Diesel Particulate Matter
description: Limit DPM exposure in underground metal/nonmetal mines.

title: MSHA Noise Standard
description: Apply MSHA noise exposure limits with hearing conservation.

title: MSHA Accident Reporting
description: Report fatalities and injuries to MSHA per 30 CFR 50.

title: NESHAP for Mining
description: Comply with EPA NESHAP for hazardous air pollutants from mining.

title: Mining NPDES Permits
description: Obtain NPDES permits for mining wastewater discharges.

title: Surface Mining Control and Reclamation Act
description: Comply with SMCRA for surface coal mining and reclamation.

title: RCRA for Mining Waste
description: Manage mining hazardous waste per RCRA Subtitle C.

title: CERCLA Superfund Liability
description: Apply CERCLA Superfund liability for hazardous releases.

title: General Mining Law of 1872
description: Comply with General Mining Law for mining claims on federal land.

title: BLM 43 CFR 3809 Surface Management
description: Comply with BLM 43 CFR 3809 surface management for mining.

title: USFS Mining in National Forests
description: Comply with USFS mining regulations on National Forest System lands.

title: ICMM 10 Sustainability Principles
description: Adopt ICMM 10 sustainability principles for responsible mining.

title: Global Industry Standard on Tailings Management
description: Apply GISTM for tailings facility safety and management.

title: IRMA Standard for Responsible Mining
description: Pursue IRMA certification for responsible mining operations.

title: OSHA for Non-Mine Operations
description: Apply OSHA general industry standards to non-mine operations.

title: ISO 14001 Mining EMS
description: Establish EMS per ISO 14001 for mining environmental management.

title: ISO 45001 Mining OHSMS
description: Establish OHSMS per ISO 45001 for miner safety beyond MSHA.

title: Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative
description: Disclose payments to governments per EITI Standard 2023.

title: Dodd-Frank Section 1504 Disclosure
description: Disclose payments to governments per Dodd-Frank Section 1504.

title: Conflict Minerals Reporting
description: Report 3TG conflict minerals from DRC region per Dodd-Frank 1502.

title: OECD Due Diligence Guidance
description: Apply OECD due diligence guidance for responsible mineral supply chains.

title: EU Conflict Minerals Regulation
description: Comply with EU Conflict Minerals Regulation 2017/821.

title: UFLPA Forced Labor
description: Verify mineral supply chain does not include Xinjiang-produced materials.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for mining supply chain.

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen mining customers and partners against OFAC SDN list.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international mining operations.

title: UK Bribery Act Compliance
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery.

title: Clean Air Act Compliance
description: Comply with Clean Air Act including Title V permits where applicable.

title: EPA Methane NSPS
description: Comply with EPA NSPS subparts for mining methane emissions.

title: EPCRA TRI Reporting
description: Report toxic releases per EPCRA Section 313 (TRI Form R).

title: EPA Risk Management Plan
description: Submit RMP for facilities with regulated substances above threshold.

title: SPCC Spill Prevention Plan
description: Maintain SPCC plan for facilities with regulated oil storage.

title: Coal Combustion Residuals Rule
description: Manage coal ash per EPA CCR Rule.

title: Multi-Sector General Permit
description: Obtain NPDES MSGP for industrial mining stormwater.

title: NEPA Environmental Review
description: Apply NEPA environmental review for federal mining projects.

title: Endangered Species Act
description: Apply ESA Section 7 consultation for mining projects affecting listed species.

title: PSM for Mineral Processing
description: Apply OSHA PSM to mineral processing with regulated chemicals above TQ.

title: Tailings Dam Safety
description: Apply USACE/BLM dam safety standards to tailings impoundments.

title: Reclamation Bond Posting
description: Post reclamation bonds per OSM rules for surface coal mining.

title: BLM Reclamation Bonding
description: Post bonds for hardrock mining on BLM lands per 43 CFR 3809.500.

title: International Cyanide Management Code
description: Apply ICMI Cyanide Code for gold mining operations using cyanide.

title: Responsible Jewellery Council
description: Maintain RJC Code of Practices certification for precious metal mining.

title: OSHA General Duty Clause
description: Provide workplace free from recognized hazards.

title: Refuge Chamber Compliance
description: Maintain refuge chambers per MSHA underground mining standards.

title: Underground Mine Communications
description: Maintain two-way communication systems per MINER Act.

title: Miner Tracking Requirements
description: Maintain miner location tracking systems per MINER Act.

title: Self-Contained Self-Rescuers
description: Provide SCSRs to miners per MSHA underground coal mining rules.

title: TENORM/NORM Compliance
description: Manage Technologically Enhanced NORM per state radiation rules.

title: NRC Uranium/Thorium Licensing
description: Obtain NRC licensing for source material extraction (uranium/thorium).

title: Lawful Basis for Worker Data
description: Document lawful basis for mining worker personal data processing.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Worker Data Transfers
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for worker data transfers outside EEA.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Mining ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for mining OT and IT systems including survey/exploration data.

title: IEC 62443 OT Cybersecurity
description: Apply IEC 62443 to mining industrial automation and control systems.

title: Ship Performance Standards
description: Apply ISO 19030 for mining shipping efficiency metrics.

title: REACH for Mining Chemicals
description: Comply with REACH for chemicals used in EU mining operations.

title: EU Water Framework Directive
description: Comply with EU Water Framework Directive for mining water impacts.

title: EU Mining Waste Directive
description: Comply with EU Mining Waste Directive 2006/21/EC.

title: EU Seveso III Directive
description: Comply with Seveso III for major accident hazards from dangerous substances.

title: EU Industrial Emissions Directive
description: Comply with EU IED for installations with mining/processing activities.

title: EU Critical Raw Materials Act
description: Comply with EU CRMA for strategic and critical raw material supply.

title: BSEE Offshore Operations
description: Comply with BSEE regulations for offshore mining/dredging.

title: International Seabed Authority
description: Apply ISA regulations for deep-sea mining beyond national jurisdiction.

title: ISO 50001 Energy Management
description: Establish EnMS per ISO 50001 for mining energy efficiency.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: CDP Climate Disclosure
description: Submit CDP climate questionnaire annually for mining operations.

title: GRI Mining Sector Standard
description: Report per GRI 14: Mining Sector Standard.

title: JORC Code Reserves Reporting
description: Report mineral resources/reserves per JORC Code.

title: Canadian NI 43-101
description: Report mineral resources per Canadian NI 43-101 standards.

title: SEC S-K 1300 Reserves Disclosure
description: Disclose mineral resources per SEC Subpart 1300 of Regulation S-K.

title: FMCSA for Mining Trucks
description: Apply FMCSA rules for haul trucks operating on public roads.

title: PHMSA Hazmat for Mining
description: Apply PHMSA HMR for hazmat transport from mining operations.

title: Tribal Consultation Requirements
description: Conduct government-to-government tribal consultation per 36 CFR 800.

title: NHPA Section 106 Compliance
description: Apply NHPA Section 106 for historic preservation in mining projects.

title: Indigenous Rights Compliance
description: Apply Free Prior and Informed Consent (FPIC) per UN Declaration.

title: ILO Convention 169
description: Apply ILO Convention 169 indigenous and tribal peoples rules.

title: EU AI Act for Mining AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations for mining AI systems.

title: Mining Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS per ISO 22301 for mining operations continuity.

title: Mining Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering OT/IT and exploration data.

title: E-Verify for Mining
description: Use E-Verify where state law mandates for new hires.

title: FLSA Wage and Hour
description: Comply with FLSA minimum wage and overtime for mining employees.

title: Workers' Compensation Coverage
description: Maintain workers' compensation coverage per state requirements.

title: Federal Mineral Royalties
description: Pay federal mineral royalties per Federal Oil and Gas Royalty Management Act.

title: FATCA Reporting
description: Apply FATCA reporting where mining banking operations exist.

title: Pay Ratio Disclosure
description: Disclose CEO pay ratio per Dodd-Frank Section 953(b).

title: MSHA Inspection Records
description: Maintain MSHA inspection records and abatement evidence.

title: ICMM Tailings Position Statement
description: Apply ICMM tailings management position statement post-Brumadinho.

title: Bonsucro Standard for Sugar Cane Mining
description: Apply Bonsucro standard where sugar cane processing applies.

title: Country-Level EITI Disclosure
description: Submit country-level disclosures in EITI implementing countries.

title: RMI Conformant Smelters
description: Source minerals from RMI-conformant smelters for high-risk supply chains.
